docs.title: WickdHub
docs.text: Welcome to the hub. Everything you need — outlines, trackers, research, and summaries — organized and accessible from any device.

docs.title: Quick Navigation
docs.text: Section What's Here Outlines Training outlines, module structures, curriculum maps Trackers Project status, content gaps, implementation progress Research Architecture docs, product intelligence, technical research Summaries User summaries, org directories, profile references

docs.title: Recently Updated
docs.text:
Getting Started

Drop markdown files into any folder under docs/, commit and push — they'll appear here automatically.

docs.title: Outlines
docs.text:
Training outlines, module structures, and curriculum maps.

Add your first outline

Save any .md file to this folder and add it to the nav section in mkdocs.yml. It'll show up here automatically.

docs.title: Example structure for an outline
docs.text:
# Module Title

## Learning Objectives
- Objective 1
- Objective 2

## Topics Covered
1. Topic A
2. Topic B
3. Topic C

## Duration
Estimated: 45 minutes

## Notes
Any additional context or delivery notes.

docs.title: Pop!_OS Install Guide — ASUS GU502LU
docs.text: Full step-by-step for wiping Windows and building a Linux + AI dev machine from scratch on the ASUS ROG Zephyrus M15. Covers NVIDIA drivers, Ollama, Open WebUI, Obsidian, and Claude Desktop.

docs.title: April 7 — Kelsey Meeting Quick Reference
docs.text:
Condensed one-page reference for the Kelsey Butler meeting. Posting vs. work gap analysis, three universal questions, five scenario-specific question sets, and universal principles.

Designed to be open during the meeting as a glanceable guide.

docs.title: April 7 — Meeting Prep
docs.text:
Full prep document for both Tuesday meetings: Kelsey Butler (11:30 AM) and Patty Mazerolle (2:00 PM).

Covers context, proof of work since March 23, talking points, five scenario responses for Kelsey, specific asks for Patty, and the weekly priority stack.
